name: Katumon
tagline: Sleep? That's for after the deploy.
role: B4 Student @ Institute of Science Tokyo
bio: B4 student in the Department of Computer Science, School of Computing, Institute of Science Tokyo. Joining the Rio Yokota Lab in 2026. Passionate about programming and gaming.

hobbies.note1: I'm deeply into Genshin Impact. I also juggle and cook occasionally.
hobbies.note2: Started drawing illustrations as a hobby from March 2026. Still learning...

projects.Portfolio: This portfolio site. Built with Next.js and hosted on Vercel.
projects.PainRecorder: A Japanese web app for chronic pain patients to record and visualize pain intensity, built with Next.js + PostgreSQL. Features weather data integration, PWA support, and graph analysis.
projects.ZZZ-Translator: A Python program that collects and integrates Zenless Zone Zero terminology from 4 sources (Wiki, XML, etc.) and registers them as custom glossaries for the Google Cloud Translation API. Includes AI-powered cleaning functionality.
projects.ZZZ-SearchApi: An API server that searches and scrapes Zenless Zone Zero Wiki information and returns AI-generated summaries.
projects.ZZZ-SearchOverlay: An Electron desktop app for quickly looking up in-game terms while playing Zenless Zone Zero. Supports text search and image search via screenshot.
projects.GenshinImpactDPSCalculator: A time-driven combat simulator and DPS calculation tool for Genshin Impact. Accurately reproduces skill animations, elemental reactions, and ICD, with an artifact optimization pipeline and RL learning module.
projects.ArtifactSimulator: A web app that calculates and visualizes the score probability distribution after Genshin Impact artifact enhancement. Automatically recognizes sub-stats from screenshots and displays results as histograms and statistics.
projects.ArtifactSimulator-Backend: Backend API for the Genshin Impact artifact enhancement simulator. Analyzes images via OCR using the Google Cloud Vision API and returns score distribution and statistics after enhancement.
projects.NeuralNetwork: A neural network implemented from scratch in C. Learns via backpropagation and verifies sine wave approximation. Results are visualized in Jupyter Notebook.
